description: Asset migration manifest for Slice 18 18d. Each entry maps an apps/web/static/<path> to its target Directus folder + metadata. Consumed by scripts/migrate-assets.ts.

folders.brand: Site-chrome assets — hero art, metro illustrations, logo (18l).
folders.about: About-page assets — headshot, interests, logos, polaroids.
folders.og: OG-share images per route — populated by 18h.

assets.title: Montreal metro map
assets.description: Stylized Montreal metro map illustration; visual anchor for the services-as-stations metaphor.

assets.title: Headshot — Yesid
assets.description: Portrait photograph of Yesid; used as the primary author image on the /about page.

assets.title: Polaroid — Montreal 1
assets.description: Decorative polaroid photograph used in the /about page polaroid strip.

assets.title: Polaroid — Dante
assets.description: Polaroid photograph of Dante, the family dog, used in the /about page photo strip.

assets.title: Polaroid — Poupoune
assets.description: Polaroid photograph of Poupoune, Yesid's dog, used in the /about page photo strip.

assets.title: Polaroid — Yesid
assets.description: Polaroid photograph of Yesid used in the /about page photo strip.

assets.title: Polaroid — family
assets.description: Polaroid photograph of Yesid with family, used in the /about page photo strip.

assets.title: Polaroid — friends
assets.description: Polaroid photograph of Yesid with friends, used in the /about page photo strip.

assets.title: Polaroid — Ottawa museum
assets.description: Polaroid photograph from an Ottawa museum day, used in the /about page photo strip.

assets.title: Interests — anime
assets.description: Decorative illustration representing Yesid's interest in anime; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: Interests — transit
assets.description: Transit photograph representing Yesid's interest in public transportation; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: Interests — food
assets.description: Decorative illustration representing Yesid's interest in food; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: Interests — space
assets.description: Space image representing Yesid's interest in astronomy; used in the /about page interests grid.

assets.title: yesid.dev — cover screenshot
assets.description: Cover screenshot of the yesid.dev site; used on the /projects listing + project-detail page for the self-referential case study.
